data.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: All ACs verified ✓ — AC1 (CONFIDENT/UNCERTAIN): PASS, AC2 (per-story tracking): PASS, AC3 (REPLAN_TRIGGER: failure): PASS, AC4 (REPLAN_RESOLVED...implementation-plan): PASS. AC amendments: story_uncertain_counts initialized in Phase 2 Step 2 alongside replan_cycle_count; persists across batch iterations; keyed by parent story ID; REPLAN_TRIGGER written BEFORE re-planning; only STATUS:pass + UNCERTAIN counts toward threshold.
